case_title: LUCIANA GALINA VS. ALLEN BARNES et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALINA, LUCIANA SERVED FEB-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALINA, LUCIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1455 FILBERT STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALINA, LUCIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION KATHRYN QUETEL FILED RE: COPY OF RENTAL AGREEMENT ATTACHED TO THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALINA, LUCIANA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALINA, LUCIANA SERVED FEB-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $31.46 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALINA, LUCIANA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, ALLEN
